Idhu Kaaki Sattai Song Lyrics Kaaki Sattai 2014
Singer : Vishal Dadlani
Music: Anirudh

bring it that break
break break break

idhu kaaki sattai
pori paraakkudhe
unnai thaedi pinnal
valarum en edhirkaalame.

idhu kaaki sattai
theri therikkudhe
munneri vandhu veluthuttu
vaa nanbanae

vinmeen kaikettidu
verum meengal vendaamada.
ada vaanam ennada
adhai thaandi nee sellada

Mazhai pole endrume
un vervai ne sindhada.
Kaattaaru koattil nikkaadhada
karai thaandi odu
ne odadaa.

idhu kaaki sattai
pori paraakkudhe
unnai thaedi pinnal
valarum en edhirkaalame.

idhu kaaki sattai
theri therikkudhe
munneri vandhu veluthuttu
vaa nanbanae

ta ta taana
ta ta taana
ta ta taana
ta ta taana
taanaa

Pogum paadhayil kodi
pallam thondralaam.
odu nee oru aruvi
seeridum vazhiyile.

Oh aani enbadhum
naalai yaeni aagalaam
yaavum ne thoda thodave
maaridum nodyile

Udhaikkaadha pandhil endrume
vegangal illaye.
Nadakkaadhal kaaluku endrume
...illaye.

un nenjil ulla sakthiyai
nanbaa ne nambidu
idhuthaane vazhakai thathuvam
vaa vendridu.

Mazhai pole endrume
un vervai ne sindhada.
Kaattaaru koattil nikkaadhada
karai thaandi odu
ne odadaa.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a lively and energetic vibe, celebrating the spirit of fun and enjoyment.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Kaaki Sattai, this song highlights a pivotal moment of celebration and joy among the characters.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Vishal Dadlani and composed by Anirudh.

When was the song released?

The song was published on January 3, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Kaaki Sattai, Idhu Kaaki Sattai serves as an energetic anthem that encapsulates the joy and excitement of the characters. The upbeat tempo and lively lyrics evoke feelings of celebration and camaraderie. The song's vibrant beats, crafted by Anirudh, paired with Vishal Dadlani's dynamic vocals, create an irresistible urge to dance. Overall, it perfectly complements the festive spirit portrayed in the movie.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Idhu Kaaki Sattai is a high-energy dance number that showcases the vibrant collaboration between Vishal Dadlani and Anirudh. With its infectious beats and catchy lyrics, this song is sure to get you moving. Experience the electrifying vibe of Kaaki Sattai and let the music take over!

this is a crow's stick, it flies searching for you, my future will grow because of you.
this is a crow's stick, it is clear, come forward, my friend, and show me.
the sky is not just for the fish, don't say that you will cross it.
like rain, your voice is sweet. don't stay in the bushes, cross the shore and run away.
